_schema_docs._description: This section documents the features.json schema and is not used by any scripts. Scripts read only 'project', 'sprints', and 'metadata'. You may delete this section.

blocked_reason.description: Explains why a feature is blocked. Used when status is 'blocked'. Example: 'Waiting for API access from infra team'

category.description: Feature category for grouping. One of: core, ui, api, auth, data, infra.

priority.description: Feature priority. One of: high, medium, low.

acceptance_criteria.description: List of testable conditions that must be met for the feature to be considered complete.

dependencies.description: List of feature IDs that must be completed before this feature can start.

estimated_complexity.description: Size estimate. One of: small, medium, large.

files_affected.description: List of file paths that this feature is expected to modify or create.

feature_example_blocked.title: Example blocked feature
feature_example_blocked.description: This feature demonstrates the blocked_reason field
feature_example_blocked.blocked_reason: Waiting for external API credentials from the infrastructure team
